text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Winning Ticket has safely completed
her debut, it's time to decide the next race to
enter.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... There are so many to choose from. I
can't decide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm not good at thinking so deeply! Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is peering at reference books and
past data. She's trying her hardest, but it seems
to be a struggle.
choice_data_list: (I have to do right as her trainer!)
(I have to do right as her trainer!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My motivation renewed, I sit down to draft a solid
race agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're aiming for the Japanese Derby, I need to
make sure Ticket gets the hang of running longer
distances.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, my attention is drawn to the
Hopeful Stakes—the longest of all the junior G1
races.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! That's a G1 race! Sounds fun!
choice_data_list: Let's try to get the best results we can!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Now it's really starting to feel like I'm
competing in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, our training for the Hopeful Stakes
begins!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiiight! Here goes climb number seven!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: HOPEFUUUUL STAAAAKES!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ticket is pouring all her strength in running uphill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Elsewhere in the training grounds, I can see her
fellow Japanese Derby hopefuls, Narita Taishin
and Biwa Hayahide, busy with their own practice.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is doing time trials, working on
improving her overall pace.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is doing build-up runs to develop
her speed and stamina.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each in their own way, they're all working toward
surpassing each another when they eventually
meet in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training continues on through the days, and one
evening...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Whew...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: How did I do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to measure her abilities, I'm timing her
runs on the 2,000 meter turf. It's the same track
type as the Hopeful Stakes, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our results aren't quite there yet.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! Even though I'm trying so hard?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: B-but why? I'm doing my best out there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? Is something troubling you, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahideeee! I'm really troubled! Super-duper
troubled!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is a good friend to Ticket. Maybe
she can help us figure something out.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're not reaching the times you'd like to hit? I
see.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'm not working hard enough...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: If you want, we could have a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it will solve your problem, but it
may be a nice break from practice. We might as
well invite Taishin too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we decide to hold an impromptu scrimmage
with the three friends competing against each
other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the gates opening echoes across the
track. I press my stopwatch as they sprint off
together.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well then, same as usual!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide takes the lead, with Winning
Ticket and Narita Taishin chasing close behind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually the three racers pass the fourth corner
and head into the final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin initiates her final spurt and passes
Biwa Hayahide in one go!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah! You've gained more stamina, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hrrgh! Don't forget me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the back-and-forth between the two in front
continues, Ticket lets out a shout.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
UWAAAGH! I won't lose, I won't lose, I WON'T
LOSE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She kicks up dirt, swinging her arms forcefully, all
to reach the finish line faster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With pure determination gleaming in their eyes,
all three fly across the finish line almost
simultaneously!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Aw maaaan, I'm beat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Incredibly, the result is a three-way tie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Winning Ticket calms down to her
usual self, but I can't shake the memory of the
sheer intensity she showed just moments earlier.
choice_data_list:
(That must've been a pretty good time she
made...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To confirm, I look at my stopwatch and see...
she's beaten her personal record!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?! I beat my fastest time? YAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's awesome! I wonder what got into me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that plain as day? Your desire to defeat us
pushed your muscles into a higher gear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"UWAAAGH! I won't lose, I won't lose, I WON'T
LOSE!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intense determination to win that Winning
Ticket showed during the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's what she lacked during regular
training—the pursuit of victory.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Hayahide! You're right! Hearing your steps
dashing along with my own made my heart beat
so loud!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Inside my chest... something went all HRRAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that the presence of rivals to compete
with is more important to Ticket than I realized.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much, Hayahide! I finally managed to
improve my time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha... I'm glad I could assist in your growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that satisfied smile on Biwa Hayahide's
face, I realize something.
choice_data_list:
Did you know this would happen when you
suggested this race?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No... I wasn't certain. However, I've had a similar
experience myself, you see.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I thought there was a chance that this would be
just what Ticket needed too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Helping the enemy... Just how confident are you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I value her as a rival. If it's needed, I'll give a leg
up.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Hayahide, are you giving up a whole leg?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's just an expression, idiot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scrimmage ends with everyone enjoying each
other's company.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rivalry... Maybe having rivals is the most
important thing for Ticket to perform well in the
Twinkle Series.
